backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a workshop POS system, defining types and state for inventory, transactions, work orders, shop settings, and user profiles, with mixins for blob storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: fixing the Work Order button on ServicePage, and reverting CashierPage and InventoryPage to their Draft Version 15 states.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a build/change reference for the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and brand color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Kasir Bengkel' that mounts the React app via the root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for all pages (Cashier, Inventory, Service, Transactions, Reports, Settings), wrapped in QueryClient and dark ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog component that prompts the user to enter their name and saves it as a user profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component displaying shop info, transaction details, itemized list, and totals in Indonesian, with optional logo, discount, and customer phone number.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders a fixed sidebar with a logo and navigation links for the main app sections (Kasir, Inventori, Servis, Transaksi, Laporan, Pengaturan), highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data operations including inventory, transactions, work orders, reports, shop settings, and user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (colors, sidebar, brand), typography using Inter and Roboto Condensed, and print styles for 80mm receipt output.
frontend/src/lib/urlParams.ts: Utility module for storing, reading, and clearing work order navigation data (customer and vehicle info) in sessionStorage between pages.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, date/time formatting, and date-to-nanosecond conversions used throughout the app.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: Self-contained XLSX file writer and reader implemented without external dependencies, using browser CompressionStream/DecompressionStream for ZIP/DEFLATE and building valid .xlsx files from scratch.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: POS cashier page that lets users search inventory, build a cart, and complete transactions with customer/vehicle info, including receipt display and work order auto-fill support.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page for adding, editing, deleting, and bulk importing/exporting goods and services items with stock tracking and XLSX support.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, displaying a branded card with a login button and loading state.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with tabbed views for daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss reports, using date inputs to query and display business analytics.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Work order management page for creating, viewing, completing, and deleting vehicle service orders, with status tracking and navigation to the cashier page.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing shop information (name, address, phone, thank-you message) and uploading a logo with progress tracking, persisted via backend queries.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Displays a searchable, filterable table of past transactions with date range filters, and supports viewing transaction details and printing receipts via a dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters (supporting both query strings and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors using oklch variables, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a service/repair management system, recording known issues (broken work order button in v19, cashier/inventory pages needing revert to v15) and the corresponding fix feature requests.
